seedNotes: Pinned Umami seed-data creates Demo Blog at blog.example.com and Demo SaaS at app.example.com with 30 days of sessions, page paths, custom events, and revenue data.

conversations.description: Ask for the highest-traffic pages on the seeded Demo SaaS site.
prompts: For Demo SaaS at app.example.com, show the top pages by views for the last 7 days.

conversations.description: Ask about seeded Demo Blog article performance.
prompts: On Demo Blog, compare traffic for /blog/privacy-first-tracking and /blog/getting-started-with-analytics this month.

conversations.description: Ask for seeded purchase/revenue tracking on Demo SaaS.
prompts: Summarize purchase revenue for Demo SaaS this month and break it down by pro versus enterprise if the data is available.

conversations.description: Ask for signup funnel events seeded on Demo SaaS.
prompts: For app.example.com, compare signup_started and signup_completed events over the last 30 days.

conversations.description: Ask for a behavioral acquisition breakdown on the seeded Demo Blog.
prompts: For blog.example.com, show the top referrers or traffic sources for the last 30 days.
